text: Every onboarding case must record legal entity name registration identifier registered address country of formation client type expected products and risk rating before review.
For legal entity customers collect ownership percentages and identify each natural person with twenty five percent or more ownership or effective control.
Sanctions PEP and adverse media screening must be completed and cleared or escalated before onboarding approval.
For Atlas Robotics Inc collect ownership chart control person identity source of wealth rationale EIN confirmation and Delaware formation certificate.
If evidence is missing operations must request Delaware certificate IRS EIN letter board resolution for signer ownership chart and source of wealth memo.
Northwind Maple Ltd requires provincial registration number authorized signer validation and business address evidence before periodic review closure.
Baltic Correspondent Bank GmbH requires nested relationship review AML program evidence sanctions controls and correspondent banking senior approval.
Saffron Foods LLP may use GST registration business address and owner PAN evidence for low risk SME onboarding.
Every onboarding decision must link each required action to the policy document section and version supporting it.
Before approval validate case country client type and risk rating so only matching global and regional policies are applied.
